lang_subtext: Select your preferred language to continue
onboarding_subtitle_1: Dedicated to your family’s health. Discover expert care and schedule your next visit with absolute confidence.
onboarding_subtitle_2: Connect with diverse specialists across every field. Fast, safe, and intuitive health management designed for your family's busy life.
onboarding_subtitle_3: Access a curated network of the best doctors. Get the peace of mind that comes with having elite healthcare available whenever you need it.
auth_welcome_subtitle: Select your account type to get started with the right healthcare tools for you
login_subtitle_manage_account: Please sign in to manage your account
login_password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
register_header_subtitle: Join our community to manage your health and connect with top specialists easily
complete_profile_subtitle: Complete your profile to get personalized doctor recommendations and faster booking.
register_facility_user_id_missing: User ID is required to register a facility
register_facility_failed: Failed to register facility. Please try again.
register_facility_max_files_reached: Maximum number of files reached. Please remove some files before uploading more.
register_facility_missing_info: Please fill in all required fields and upload all necessary documents.
register_facility_enter_birth_date: Please enter a valid date of birth
register_facility_birth_date_invalid: Date of birth cannot be in the future
register_facility_national_id_files_requ: Please upload both front and back images of your National ID
register_facility_national_id_invalid_pa: Invalid file paths for National ID. Please check your uploads.
license_verification_subtitle: Upload your medical license to complete your professional profile
medical_license_upload_text:
Upload your medical license (PDF)
Ensure your full name and license number are clearly visible
professional_photo_hint: Upload a clear professional photo (JPG or PNG)
clinic_claim_success_message: Your clinic claim has been submitted successfully. Our team will review your claim and get back to you within 3-5 business days.
staff_request_success_message: Your staff request has been submitted successfully. Our team will review your request and get back to you within 3-5 business days.
owner_documents_uploaded_message: Your documents have been uploaded successfully. Our team will review your submission and get back to you within 3-5 business days.
claim_documents_description: Legal documents required to prove ownership of an unowned clinic.
staff_documents_description: Staff identification and employment proof for the selected clinic.
owner_documents_description: License, commercial registration, and tax card for your own clinic.
upload_legal_files_claim: Upload legal documents required to prove ownership of an unowned clinic.
upload_staff_credentials: Upload staff identification and employment proof for the selected clinic.
upload_owner_files: Upload license, commercial registration, and tax card for your own clinic.
please_upload_all_documents: Please upload all required documents to proceed
missing_user_session: User session is missing. Please log in again.
select_clinic_for_staff: Please select the clinic you want staff access for.
upload_required_credentials: Please upload all required credentials to proceed.
clinic_details_subtitle: Set up your workspace to help patients find and understand your services
facility_name_subtitle: Enter the name of your clinic or hospital
facility_contact_subtitle: Enter a phone number for patients to contact you
facility_location_subtitle: locate your clinic on the map to help patients find you easily
facility_address_subtitle: Enter the full address of your clinic for accurate directions
appointment_details_subtitle: Configure your consultation types and pricing
fee_help_text: Set your fee for this consultation type. This will be displayed
upload_records_subtitle: Add your previous medical documents to complete your profile.
upload_area_text: Upload previous medical records (X-Rays, Lab results) or prescriptions (PDF, JPG)
past_records_subtitle: Quickly document your health issues to keep your digital medical file up to date
empty_health_issues_subtitle: Keeping your medical history updated helps our doctors provide the most accurate care for you. If you don't have any chronic conditions or past illnesses to report, you can simply click save to continue.
notes_hint: Add any note about the issue
recovery_date_required: Recovery date is required when status is inactive
family_member_subtitle: Link your family members to your account to simplify their medical visits and keep their health history organized.
empty_family_member_subtitle: Your family circle is empty. Start by adding your spouse, children, or parents to coordinate their health journey effortlessly
search_hint: Find the right doctor for you
